meta.reasoning_summary: 4c Td is a weak hand but worth a cheap call from position to see the flop. No reason to raise or fold with this stack depth.

meta.reasoning: Button position with Q6o. Positional raise to 4x BB (80) to represent strength and potentially win the pot pre-flop. Three opponents to act (s2 SB, s3 BB, s4 limper) — pressure on all of them. If called, I have position advantage throughout the hand.

meta.reasoning_summary: Q9 offsuit out of position facing a 4x raise. Marginal hand that plays poorly OOP. Fold is correct here.
K7 suited (spades) has flush potential. Calling 60 into a 130 pot is reasonable pot odds. s1 raised to 80 from dealer position — could be a steal, but K7s is worth seeing a flop.

result.summary: s3 wins by chip lead after 30 hands (s3: 3920, s1: 80). Biggest pot: 3920. Showdowns: 27.
